<!-- Thanks for contributing to mdread! -->

## What & why

Briefly: what does this change, and why?

Fixes # (issue, if any)

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Typography / design polish
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Sanity-checked the real output with `npm run preview` (Chrome/Edge for live save-to-disk)
- [ ] No new external/runtime requests — still local-first and private
- [ ] System fonts only (no web fonts added)
- [ ] Diff stays focused and matches surrounding code style

## Screenshots

For anything visual, before/after screenshots help a lot.
